title: Expand latency metrics per endpoint
description: Add per-endpoint latency tracking: histogram buckets for streaming endpoints, API routes, skill executions. Implement in metrics.rs and expose via /api/v1/metrics.

title: Add per-endpoint error rate tracking
description: Track error rates by endpoint: /api/v1/tasks, /api/v1/skills, /stream/*, /api/v1/mcp/*. Implement error categorization and expose aggregated rates.

title: Implement monitoring UI surface
description: Add monitoring/dashboard tab to UI: real-time metrics visualization, latency charts, error rate trends. AgentZero-styled theming.

title: Document SLO targets and maintenance plan
description: Create SLO documentation in TELEMETRY_ROLLOUT.md: availability targets, latency p95/p99, error rate thresholds, maintenance windows, escalation paths.

title: Add telemetry integration tests
description: Create integration tests for telemetry surface: metrics endpoint responds, latency histograms populated, error rates calculated correctly. Minimum 5 new tests.

title: Create Phase 2 runbook
description: Create runbook for telemetry incident response: high latency, error spikes, metric gaps. Include debug commands and escalation paths.

title: Update parity scorecard for Telemetry axis
description: Fill in parity scorecard for Telemetry axis: feature coverage, quality, observability, evidence. Mark status as completed.

title: Phase 2 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 2.1-2.5. Document results in phase2_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 3.
